output.headerText: RobCo U.O.S. — full-repo AI context pack. Private agent files (RULES.md, CLAUDE.md, .claude/) are excluded. The PowerShell test runner (tests/robco-diagnostics.ps1) is excluded as a byte-for-byte-coverage mirror of the canonical Node runner (tests/robco-diagnostics.js), which is kept — this halves the test-runner share of the pack with zero coverage-context loss. Run: npx repomix
